name: stackra/feature-flags
purpose: Multi-tenant feature-flag layer on Laravel Pennant with a KillSwitch, Override, Rollout, PlanGate, and default resolution chain, attributes, admin actions, and a Saloon SDK.
capabilities: KillSwitch, Override, Rollout, PlanGate, default chain
AI tool visibility gating via GatesToolVisibility
when_to_use: Gating a feature on a per-tenant / per-user / rollout basis with kill-switch capability.
when_not_to_use: For quota-based plan entitlements or subscription state, reach for stackra/entitlements or stackra/subscription.
